posts.title: BIOLAND-Cy project kicks off
posts.summary: The BIOLAND-Cy project formally begins at the Eratosthenes Centre of Excellence, linking Earth Observation with bioarchaeology across Cyprus.

posts.title: How NDVI helps us read ancient land use
posts.summary: The first in a series of method explainers — turning modern satellite vegetation data into a window on the ancient Cypriot landscape.

posts.title: Six sites, one framework
posts.summary: From Khirokitia to Hala Sultan Tekke — meet the six Tier 1 sites driving the project's diet and resource indexing.
